items.title: Layer 1 — unit suite passes for the completeness-fill flow
items.evidence: 67 tests passed across 3 files (vitest, 2026-07-18); tsc 0 errors; check:conventions --strict 0 structural violations

items.title: A fillable gap stages an owner-approval draft, does NOT publish
items.precondition: authed operator on a location whose GBP is missing a website AND whose domain Alloro holds; write-back master switch on for that account
items.expected: 201; a business_info draft in awaiting-approval status with only websiteUri in the patch; nothing sent to Google
items.notes: closes on dev after the dev/dave -> sandbox clone; sandbox currently has no GBP tables to exercise this

items.title: Nothing fillable returns an honest empty, never a fabricated draft
items.precondition: authed operator on a location with no fillable gap (or no independent value source)
items.expected: 200 with the unfillable gaps surfaced (reasons), no draft created
items.notes: closes on dev after the clone

items.title: Category / phone / hours are never auto-filled
items.precondition: authed operator on a location missing category/phone/hours
steps: 2. Confirm those fields appear as no-value-source, not in any patch
items.expected: category/phone/hours surfaced as unfillable (no-value-source); never staged
items.evidence: Layer 1 covers this in unit (gbp-completeness-fill.test.ts); behavioral confirmation pending the clone
items.notes: closes on dev after the clone
